description: Wide shot of brand interior space. Architecture (Najdi arch, Hijazi rawasheen, modern lines) becomes a character.
structural_recipe: Wide shot of brand interior space. Architecture (Najdi arch, Hijazi rawasheen, modern lines) becomes a character.
why_it_works: Establishes brand identity through space, not product. Reusable across multiple posts.
transplantation_caveats: Requires brand to actually have a visually distinct interior — generic boutique fails.
